description_long: This is a classic Chesterfield-style sofa with a deep, tufted backrest and armrests, upholstered in a muted greenish-gray material. The sofa features three individual seat cushions that are uniform in size and appear to be firmly padded. The armrests are rolled and heavily cushioned, matching the height of the backrest and adorned with deep button tufting. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered and slightly curved, maintaining the tufted pattern throughout. The base of the sofa is solid and extends to the floor, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and substantial appearance. The overall design exudes a vintage, luxurious feel, suitable for upscale urban environments or stylish public spaces.
description: A vintage Chesterfield-style sofa with deep button tufting, rolled armrests, and three uniform seat cushions, upholstered in muted greenish-gray fabric. The design is plush, elegant, and visually substantial.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three seat cushions, deep button-tufted backrest, and rolled armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, rolled armrest and the depth of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and the solid, fully upholstered back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the rolled armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, uniform seat cushions are placed side by side; the backrest is a single continuous piece with deep button tufting, and all cushions appear attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled, heavily padded armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and featuring deep button tufting for a classic Chesterfield look.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully upholstered and extends to the floor, giving the appearance of a solid, grounded structure.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and curved backrest with deep button tufting, matching the armrests in height and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Deep button-tufted upholstery with a matte, slightly textured finish; no visible printed patterns, only the tufting and stitching create the visual texture.
